response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: The Reference JSON for the first song (00:00-00:55) was incorrect; the song performed was 'Dancing Reed', not 'Kyozou no Carousel'. The second song ('Dawn Blue') matched the reference perfectly. 2. JSON Usage: Manually transcribed 'Dancing Reed' and the entire talk segment. Utilized the 'Dawn Blue' reference for transcription and timing. 3. Timing & Pacing: Applied aggressive truncation and instantaneous transitions during the fast-paced talk segment to prevent cascading delays. Subtitles are strictly anchored to vocal onset.

subtitles.original: [曲：Dancing Reed]
subtitles.english: [Song: Dancing Reed]

subtitles.original: 教えてよ
subtitles.english: Tell me

subtitles.original: 私にかまって
subtitles.english: Pay attention to me

subtitles.original: 教えてよ 恋の先を
subtitles.english: Tell me what lies beyond love

subtitles.original: 広がって 収まらないね
subtitles.english: It's spreading and won't subside

subtitles.original: 君の存在は
subtitles.english: Your existence is...

subtitles.original: 私の将来 持っても
subtitles.english: even if it holds my future,

subtitles.original: 踏み込んだのよ 好き合ってよね
subtitles.english: I've stepped in, so let's love each other

subtitles.original: Dance dance dance with me tonight
subtitles.english: Dance dance dance with me tonight

subtitles.original: 夢中になってご覧よ
subtitles.english: Just try getting absorbed in it

subtitles.original: After the gravity
subtitles.english: After the gravity

subtitles.original: Keep on dance dance dance just to dance
subtitles.english: Keep on dance dance dance just to dance

subtitles.original: Just to dance
subtitles.english: Just to dance

subtitles.original: 声は闇に預けたまま
subtitles.english: Leaving our voices in the darkness

subtitles.original: 目を覚ましても 離れないで
subtitles.english: Even when I wake up, don't leave me

subtitles.original: Yes! 2人目のゲストは、そら先輩です！
subtitles.english: Yes! Our second guest is Sora-senpai!

subtitles.original:
はーい、みんな！ こんそらーめ、ときのそらです！
カリちゃん、お誕生日おめでとう！
subtitles.english:
Hi everyone! Kon-Sorame, Tokino Sora here!
Calli-chan, Happy Birthday!

subtitles.original: ありがとう！
subtitles.english: Thank you!

subtitles.original:
そら先輩…本当にありがとうございます。
ずっと一緒に歌いたかったから。
subtitles.english:
Sora-senpai, thank you so much.
I've always wanted to sing with you.

subtitles.original: あ、本当ですか？ ありがとう！
subtitles.english: Oh, really? Thank you!

subtitles.original: 嬉しいですよ、マジで。やったー！ ヘイヘイヘイ！
subtitles.english: I'm so happy, seriously. We did it! Hey hey hey!

subtitles.original: ヘイヘーイ！
subtitles.english: Hey hey!

subtitles.original: 可愛いよね！ すごい…すごい沢山踊りました！
subtitles.english: So cute, right? We... we danced so much!

subtitles.original: 本当だったね！
subtitles.english: We really did!

subtitles.original: アイドルわぉ！ ドキドキ！
subtitles.english: Idol wow! Doki doki!

subtitles.original: ドキドキ！
subtitles.english: Doki doki!

subtitles.original:
Yes! あ、見て！ Xでトレンド3位！
日本でトレンド3位です！ 本当にありがとう！
subtitles.english:
Yes! Oh, look! Trending #3 on X!
Trending #3 in Japan! Thank you so much!

subtitles.original: おめでとうー！
subtitles.english: Congratulations!

subtitles.original: トレンドやったー！
subtitles.english: A trend, we did it!

subtitles.original: やったー！
subtitles.english: We did it!

subtitles.original: ありがとう！ 沢山使ってね、プリーズ！ #UNCUTROCK
subtitles.english: Thank you! Please use the hashtag! #UNCUTROCK

subtitles.original: プリーズ！
subtitles.english: Please!

subtitles.original: 本当にありがとう。あぁ、幸せ。ありがとう。
subtitles.english: Thank you so much. Ah, I'm so happy. Thank you.

subtitles.original:
そして今回、大好きな曲を一緒に歌いました。
「Dancing Reed」！
subtitles.english:
And this time, we sang a song I love together.
'Dancing Reed'!

subtitles.original: 「Dancing Reed」！
subtitles.english: 'Dancing Reed'!

subtitles.original:
わぉ、すごいなんかパーティー・ハッピーですよね。
大好きです。
subtitles.english:
Wow, it's such a happy party song, isn't it?
I love it.

subtitles.original: ダンサボー！
subtitles.english: Danceable!

subtitles.original: ダンサボー！
subtitles.english: Danceable!

subtitles.original: めっちゃ良かった！
subtitles.english: It was so good!

subtitles.original: そしてほら、エメラルド来た！
subtitles.english: And look, the Emerald is here!

subtitles.original: ね！ 綺麗！ 緑！
subtitles.english: Right! It's beautiful! Green!

subtitles.original:
ですよね。誕生石ですよね。
5月の誕生祭、エメラルドです。
subtitles.english:
Exactly. It's the birthstone, right?
The May birthstone is Emerald.

subtitles.original: Emerald! おぉ、すごい良い発音！ ナイス・イングリッシュ！
subtitles.english: Emerald! Wow, great pronunciation! Nice English!

subtitles.original: あ、本当？ ありがとう！
subtitles.english: Oh, really? Thank you!

subtitles.original: Very good. そうですね。ちなみに、写真撮ろうか？
subtitles.english: Very good. So, shall we take a photo?

subtitles.original: あ、撮ろう！
subtitles.english: Oh, let's!

subtitles.original: Let's do it!
subtitles.english: Let's do it!

subtitles.original: この写真もアップしてね、X！
subtitles.english: Please upload this photo to X too!

subtitles.original: よろしくね！
subtitles.english: Looking forward to it!

subtitles.original: Yes, よろしくね！ わー、楽しい。じゃあ、水飲みましょう。
subtitles.english: Yes, please! Wow, this is fun. Now, let's drink some water.

subtitles.original: あ、お水！
subtitles.english: Ah, water!

subtitles.original: 乾杯！
subtitles.english: Cheers!

subtitles.original: 乾杯！
subtitles.english: Cheers!

subtitles.original: 飲んだほうが良いですよね。
subtitles.english: It's better to drink, right?

subtitles.original: そうね。水は大事。
subtitles.english: Yes. Water is important.

subtitles.original: そうだよ。楽しいなー、生ライブ！
subtitles.english: That's right. Live shows are so fun!

subtitles.original: 楽しいね！
subtitles.english: They are!

subtitles.original: もう一曲一緒に歌いたいんですけど、大丈夫ですか？
subtitles.english: I want to sing one more song with you. Is that okay?

subtitles.original: もちろん！
subtitles.english: Of course!

subtitles.original:
Let's do it! オッケー！
皆さん、次の曲を聴いてください。
subtitles.english:
Let's do it! Okay!
Everyone, please listen to this next song.

subtitles.original:
この曲を選んだ理由は分かってもらえるはずです。
そら先輩がこの曲のPVに出演しているからです。
subtitles.english:
You'll understand why I chose it.
It's because Sora-senpai is in the PV for this song.

subtitles.original: 私のオリジナル曲「Dawn Blue」を楽しんでください！
subtitles.english: Please enjoy my original song, 'Dawn Blue'!

subtitles.original: つかまえて、ほら この shooting star
subtitles.english: Catch it, look, this shooting star

subtitles.original: A world of our fiction awaits...
subtitles.english: A world of our fiction awaits...

subtitles.original: ずっと同じ毎日に迷いがあっても
subtitles.english: Even if there's hesitation in the same daily routine,

subtitles.original: 気づかないふりをしていたんだ
subtitles.english: I was pretending not to notice.

subtitles.original: ほんのちょっとの勇気がまだ出せなくって
subtitles.english: Because I couldn't find just a little bit of courage yet,

subtitles.original: まどろむ宇宙で彷徨っていた
subtitles.english: I was wandering in a slumbering universe.

subtitles.original: 夜空に浮かぶ
subtitles.english: Floating in the night sky,

subtitles.original: 星に願いをかけるんだ
subtitles.english: I'll make a wish on a star.

subtitles.original: I hope...
subtitles.english: I hope...

subtitles.original: 抱いてる夢を
subtitles.english: The dream I hold...

subtitles.original: 絶対諦めたくない
subtitles.english: I never want to give up on it.

subtitles.original: 走りだすから
subtitles.english: Because I'm starting to run.

subtitles.original: 追いかけて今 あの shooting star
subtitles.english: Chase it now, that shooting star.

subtitles.original: 見たことのないストーリー進んでいくんだ
subtitles.english: A story never seen before is moving forward.

subtitles.original: いつの日にかきっと
subtitles.english: Surely someday,

subtitles.original: 描いたセカイへ 辿り着けるように
subtitles.english: So that we can reach the world we envisioned.

subtitles.original: Let go...
subtitles.english: Let go...

subtitles.original: Of the days you thought mattered so, life goes on, tomorrow's rolling in
subtitles.english: Of the days you thought mattered so, life goes on, tomorrow's rolling in
